hooks.command: cd <repo-path> && branch=$(git branch --show-current) && if [ $branch = main ]; then printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Direkter Commit auf main nicht erlaubt — Branch erstellen."}'; else ./scripts/validate-repo.sh 2>&1 && echo '{}' || printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "validate-repo.sh fehlgeschlagen — alle Fehler beheben vor dem Commit"}'; fi

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY: Per CLAUDE.md, before ending this session check what was learned and update ~/git/devops-til/. New concepts go in new .md files (linux/, ansible/, proxmox/ etc.), update README.md index, then: git -C ~/git/devops-til push origin main"}}'
